zh.Holway, Devonshire, England: 英國英格蘭薩默塞特霍爾瓦
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Cary於大約1350年出生在英國薩默塞特霍爾瓦時，他的父親John Cary27歲，母親Jane de Bryen27歲。他於1374年與Margaret Holway在英國薩默塞特霍爾瓦結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他於1386年被列為chief baron of the exchequer。他去世於1395年5月28日在愛爾蘭庫迪 沃特福德沃特福德享年46歲。

zh-hans.Holway, Devonshire, England: 英国英格兰薩默塞特霍爾瓦
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Cary于大约1350年出生在英国薩默塞特霍爾瓦时，他的父亲John Cary27岁，母亲Jane de Bryen27岁。他于1374年与Margaret Holway在英国薩默塞特霍爾瓦结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他于1386年被列为chief baron of the exchequer。他去世于1395年5月28日在爱尔兰庫迪 沃特福德沃特福德享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: Cary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish (Donegal and Westmeath) and English: variant of   Carey  .

variants.name: Decorah
meanings: Americanized form of de Carrie, itself an altered form of French Decary, a variant of Cary 2, with fused preposition de ‘of’. It is found mainly among the Ho-Chunk (i.e. Winnebago) Native American people in WI.

History: The progenitor of the Decorahs was a French soldier, Joseph Sabrevoir de Carrie, who in 1729 settled for a time among the Winnebagos on Doty Island, WI, and married an Indian woman, known in English as Glory of the Morning. Decorah, a city in IA, is named after one of their descendants, Waukon Decorah (c. 1780–1868), a chief of the Winnebago.

variants.name: Carey
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Ciardha, a midland surname meaning ‘descendant of Ciardha’, a personal name derived from ciar ‘dark, black’. See Kerry .
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Fhiachra ‘son of Fiachra’.

English: from Carey Barton in Devon or Castle Cary, Lytes Cary, Cary Fitzpaine, or Babcary, all in Somerset, named for the rivers on which they stand; both river names probably derive from the Celtic root car- ‘love, liking’, perhaps with the meaning ‘pleasant stream’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John Cary was born about 1350, in Holway, Somerset, England, his father, John Cary, was 27 and his mother, Jane de Bryen, was 27. He married Margaret Holway in 1374, in Holway, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. In 1386, at the age of 37, his occupation is listed as chief baron of the exchequer. He died on 28 May 1395, in Waterford, County Waterford, Ireland, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Cary est né environ 1350, à Holway, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, John Cary, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Jane de Bryen, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Holway en 1374, à Holway, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. En 1386, à l’âge de 37 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est chief baron of the exchequer. Il est décédé le 28 mai 1395, à Waterford, County Waterford, Irlande, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Cary um 1350 in Holway, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Cary 27 und seine Mutter Jane de Bryen 27. Er hat 1374 in Holway, Somerset, England Margaret Holway geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. 1386, als er 37 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als chief baron of the exchequer aufgeführt. Er starb am 28. Mai 1395 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Waterford, County Waterford, Irland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Cary è nato il circa 1350 nel Holway, Somerset, England, il suo padre, John Cary, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Jane de Bryen, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Holway nel 1374, nel Holway, Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Nel 1386, all'età di 37 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come chief baron of the exchequer. Morì il 28 maggio 1395, nel Waterford, County Waterford, Irlanda, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Caryが約1350年にイギリスソメルセトホールワイで生まれた時，父John Caryは27歳，母Jane de Bryenは27歳であった。1374年にイギリスソメルセトホールワイでMargaret Holwayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。1386年，37歳の時，職業はchief baron of the exchequerと記録されている。彼は1395年5月28日にアイルランドコウントイ ワテルフォードワテルフォードで46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Cary(이)가 대략 1350년 영국 서머세트 홀웨이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Cary(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane de Bryen(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1374년 영국 서머세트 홀웨이에서 Margaret Holway(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 1386년, 37세의 나이로 그의 직업은 chief baron of the exchequer이었다. 그는 1395년 5월 28일 아일랜드 카운티 왓르퍼드 왓르퍼드에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Cary nasceu aproximadamente 1350, em Holway, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Cary, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Jane de Bryen, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Holway em 1374, em Holway, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Em 1386, com 37 anos, sua profissão aparece como chief baron of the exchequer. Ele faleceu em 28 de maio de 1395, em Waterford, County Waterford, Irlanda, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Cary родился около 1350 г. в местности холвеи, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени John Cary было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane de Bryen, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Holway в 1374 г. в местности холвеи, сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. В 1386 году, в возрасте 37 лет,  он работал по профессии chief baron of the exchequer. Он умер 28 мая 1395 г. в местности вэитирфорд, коунти вэитирфорд, Ирландия в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Cary nació aproximadamente 1350, en Holway, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, John Cary, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Jane de Bryen, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Margaret Holway en 1374, en Holway, Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. En 1386, a la edad de 37 años, su ocupación registrada era chief baron of the exchequer. Murió el 28 de mayo de 1395, en Waterford, County Waterford, Irlanda, a la edad de 46 años.
